special_feature: This Areca nuts are chewed with betel leaf for their effects as a mild stimulant, causing a warming sensation in the body

rainfall: Grown in areas receiving annual rainfall of 750 mm in Maidan parts of Karnataka to 4,500 mm

soil: It is grown in all type of soft but the sandy - loam, clay loam and loam soils are best suited for it
rainfall: It is grown in areas receiving an annual precipitation of 25-30 inches
irrigation: Water requirement of 400 mm to 600 mm
sowing_time: The sowing time is between Kharif Rainfed - June - July, Rabi Irrigated - Aug - Sept, Summer Irrigated - Feb - March
maturity_time: Time taken to mature is 60 to 120 days
seed_rate: Seed requirement is 1 5 kg seed ha
avg_yield: Average yields is around 5 13 t ha

pesticide: Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance
location: It is grown all around Karnataka
special_feature: Commercial importance for powdering and culinary

soil: This cotton is suitable for Red soil and Black cotton soil
rainfall: Annual rainfall of 55-100 cm is ideal for cotton Cultivation
irrigation: Individual cotton plant requires about 10 gallons of water to achieve maximum yield potential
sowing_time: The sowing time is between July -September or February - March
maturity_time: Time taken to mature is approximately 150 to 180 days
seed_rate: On average 90 000-100 000 plants per hectare
avg_yield: The cotton productivity was 250 Kgs per hectare
fertilizer: Use crop-specific fertilizer recommendations based on soil condition and local agricultural guidance
pesticide: Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance
location: High yielding varieties are cultivated in the districts like Raichur, Bagalkot, Bijapur, Bellaiy, Dharwad and Belgaum under irrigated conditions
special_feature: For the cotton plant to be able to grow, it needs a warm climate with very wet periods followed by very dry ones, as the latter are necessary for it to ripen

soil: It grows well in deep, well-drained soils of medium fertility of sandy loam soil textures with a pH range from 6 0 to 7 7
rainfall: Rainfall 100 cm to 175 cm rainfall is ideal for sugarcane production
irrigation: A crop requires 1500- 2500 mm of available water per year
sowing_time: In general January to march is the period of planting
maturity_time: It takes about 12 to 18 months to mature
seed_rate: On an average 36,000 three budded setts or 60 quintal of seed are sufficient for planting one hectare land area
avg_yield: The average yield of cane stalk is 60-70 tonnes per hectare
fertilizer: Use crop-specific fertilizer recommendations based on soil condition and local agricultural guidance
pesticide: Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance
location: Most of the sugarcane is grown with the help of irrigation Belgaum, Mandya, Mysore, Bijapur,Shimoga and Chitradurga are important producing districts
special_feature: The plant is two to six metres six to twenty feet tall All sugar cane species can interbreed and the major commercial cultivars are complex hybrids

soil: Tobacco crop requires light to medium loam soil
rainfall: For tobacco 50-100cm annual rainfall and 15-20o C temperature during growth period is ideal
irrigation: The tobacco water requirement throughout the growth period ranged from 159 00 to 278 90 mm
sowing_time: The ideal months to plant tobacco are November and December
maturity_time: Usually matures and is ready for harvest 3 to 5 weeks after topping
seed_rate: A seed rate of 3-5 kg per hectare
avg_yield: It yields on unirrigated land is usually 2,600-3,000 pound per acre
fertilizer: Use crop-specific fertilizer recommendations based on soil condition and local agricultural guidance
pesticide: Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance
location: Suitable zone in Karnataka are Mysuru and Hassan
special_feature: There is a promising way to convert tobacco leaves into pesticides with pyrolysis

soil: This soyabean is suitable for Red soil
rainfall: Requiring a minimum of 400mm
irrigation: Soybeans require from 15 to 25 inches of water per acre per year from planting through maturity depending on planting date, maturity group, location, and weather
sowing_time: Kharif season time of sowing is onset of monsoon or last week of June to first week of Jully while in spring sowing is done between 15th of February and 15th of March
maturity_time: Soybeans for shelling and fresh use are ready for harvest 45 to 65 days after sowing
seed_rate: 70-80 kg seed per hectare is required
avg_yield: It yeild 40 4 bushels per acre
fertilizer: Use crop-specific fertilizer recommendations based on soil condition and local agricultural guidance
pesticide: Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance
location: Suitable zone in Karnataka are West Coast Plains and Hills Region
special_feature: White flowers, grey pubescence, yellow seed coat, black hilum, brown pods, determinate

soil: This cardamom is suitable for Red soil
rainfall: Annual rainfall 1500 - 4000 mm is required
irrigation: A crop requires 1500- 4000 mm of available water per year
sowing_time: Throughout the cropping season of cardamom, i e from August to March approximately 6 picking is done in each 45 days interval
maturity_time: Cardamom plants normally start bearing two years after planting
seed_rate: Seed requirement is 30kg h
avg_yield: It registers the higher yield of 250 kgper hectare
fertilizer: Use crop-specific fertilizer recommendations based on soil condition and local agricultural guidance
pesticide: Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance
location: Suitable zone in Karnataka are West Coast Plains and Hills Region
special_feature: The seeds have a warm, slightly pungent, and highly aromatic flavour somewhat reminiscent of camphor

soil: This wheat is suitable for Red soil
rainfall: The amount of rainfall required for wheat cultivation varies between 30 cm and 100 cm
irrigation: A crop requires 450-650 mm of available water per year
sowing_time: Sowing of wheat takes place in October to December
maturity_time: Maturity time is around four months
seed_rate: With an average seed size of 15,000 seeds per pound or 900,000 seeds per bushel
avg_yield: Yield potential of approximately 1 5 bushels per acre
fertilizer: Use crop-specific fertilizer recommendations based on soil condition and local agricultural guidance
pesticide: Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance
location: Suitable zone in Karnataka are West Coast Plains and Hills Region
special_feature: Wheat is actually a grass and belongs to the genus Triticum species aestivum Wheat is grown globally and is the second most important cereal crop in the world behind maize and ahead of rice

avg_yield: Yield potential of approximately 1 5 bushels per acre
fertilizer: Use crop-specific fertilizer recommendations based on soil condition and local agricultural guidance
pesticide: Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance
location: Suitable zone in Karnataka are West Coast Plains and Hills Region
special_feature: Wheat is actually a grass and belongs to the genus Triticum species aestivum Wheat is grown globally and is the second most important cereal crop in the world behind maize and ahead of rice
